scripts.migrate: npx tsc scripts/run-migrations.ts --module commonjs --target es2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop && node scripts/run-migrations.js && rm -f scripts/run-migrations.js
scripts.seed: npx tsc scripts/seed-demo-data.ts --module commonjs --target es2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop && node scripts/seed-demo-data.js && rm -f scripts/seed-demo-data.js
scripts.check-db: npx tsc scripts/check-table-privileges.ts --module commonjs --target es2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop && node scripts/check-table-privileges.js && rm -f scripts/check-table-privileges.js
scripts.test: npx tsc scripts/run-tests.ts --module commonjs --target es2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node scripts/run-tests.js && rm -f scripts/run-tests.js
scripts.simulate-violation: npx tsc scripts/create-violation.ts --module commonjs --target es2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node scripts/create-violation.js && rm -f scripts/create-violation.js
